0cf5ab6f.name: look_left

c3042aaa.name: look_right

c0299b7d.name: body_right

0b26cf87.name: body_away
0b26cf87.prompt: Make the character turn their whole body to face away from the viewer, back view

cc97ae2f.name: arms_crossed
cc97ae2f.prompt: Make the character cross their arms across their chest

ad5f24e7.name: thinking
ad5f24e7.prompt: Make the character put one hand on their chin in a thinking pose, looking upward

fc929e79.name: shrug
fc929e79.prompt: Make the character shrug with both shoulders raised and both palms facing up in an 'I don't know' gesture

b7dba1e9.name: facepalm
b7dba1e9.prompt: Make the character put their hand over their face in a facepalm gesture, looking down

01dc103e.name: frustrated
01dc103e.prompt: Make the character clench both fists at their sides with a frustrated angry expression, tense shoulders

3a4adb41.name: sleeping
3a4adb41.prompt: Make the character droop their head forward with eyes closed, arms hanging at sides, as if falling asleep standing up
